case_title: KANAL V GASTON VS. GOGGLE, INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-17-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-20-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DEFAMATION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GASTON, KANAL V AS TO DEFENDANT GOGGLE, INC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-14-2012 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST KANAL V GASTON, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-17-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-01-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GASTON, KANAL V ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-17-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST KANAL V GASTON FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-18-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-05-2012. NOTE: SANCTIONS OF $350.00 PREVIOUSLY ISSUED ON JUL-18-2012 AGAINST KANAL V GASTON ARE ALSO DUE. TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $700.00. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-17-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. Court ordered sanction order issued for today's hearing to include language that the sanctions previously issued to Kanal V. Gaston on JUL-18-2012 in the amount of $350.00 for failure to appear at the JUL-17-2012 hearing are also to be paid with a total amount due of $700.00. The OSC is reset to NOV-20-2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/18/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
